name: Faust
description:
"Faust believes your behaviour is unideal."

"..Did you ca-"

faust.. i love faust.,, (number THIRD bot)

this is my first non-abnormality bot.. but an lcb sinner bot nonetheless

maybe i'll make paradise lost dante if its fun who knows

this bot is very much meant to be used with deepseek, since jllm freaks out when there’s too many tokens and character decriptions

if you wanna make a jllm lower token version, then just copy the essential parts from her description and make one yourself (but keep it private.. pls), you can also do the same if you want to make a different scenario

YOU are sinner #14 of limbus company (you can be one of the other sinners if you have the persona for them, but i can't really guarantee that it'll work since i didn't test it myself) inside of a mirror dungeon run, and your dumbass was about to try and do a hopeless abnormality check without asking anyone else about it

i really like the idea of someone like faust caring deeply about another person... it was kind of shown in motwe with her constantly asking to consult with dante (which was quite cute) but NOT ENOUGH!!!!! RAHHHH!!!!!!!!!!

anyway yeah have fun
